basics.name: 连冬杰 / DONGJIE LIAN
basics.summary: Frontend and full-stack developer focused on web applications, internal platforms, and product-minded engineering.

work.summary: Participated in the iteration of an internal RPA workflow orchestration tool for automated office scenarios.
highlights: Participated in nearly 10 requirement iterations and helped ship production features.
Implemented continue / break workflow capabilities across loops, nested blocks, and conditional branches.
Contributed to JS script, AI instruction, HTTP request, table processing, instruction block copy, and hierarchy readability features.

work.company: Environmental Development Center of the Ministry of Ecology and Environment
work.summary: Built a WebGIS system for environmental monitoring visualization and environmental social risk analysis.
highlights: Designed the study area selection, buffer generation, risk/POI analysis, and result export workflow.
Built map interaction with Vue2 and AMap API, and backend/spatial storage with Flask, PostgreSQL, and PostGIS.
Supported testing, documentation, delivery, and software copyright registration.

portfolio.name: AI-Mindcare 心灵陪伴机器人
portfolio.description: Backend development for an AI companionship product with RAG, streaming responses, Redis caching, and deployment improvements.

portfolio.name: WebGIS 环境社会风险分析系统
portfolio.description: Full-stack WebGIS system for environmental monitoring visualization, spatial analysis, risk indicators, and result export.

portfolio.name: 百度 RPA 流程编排工具迭代
portfolio.description: Frontend development for an internal RPA workflow orchestration platform.
